title: cyperus holostigma
intro: Cyperus holostigma is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as a type of grass-like plant found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Cyperus holostigma is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to leverage its medicinal properties.
